github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text:
CRITICAL RULES — read before every code generation:

1. JWT tokens are httpOnly cookies ONLY. Never use Authorization: Bearer headers in runtime code, docs, or tests. Access token = req.cookies.accessToken. Axios client uses withCredentials: true.

2. AI matching mount point is /api/v1/students/matching (NOT /students/teams). Correct URLs:
   GET  /api/v1/students/matching/:teamId/matches
   POST /api/v1/students/matching/:teamId/matches/:userId

3. Student skills endpoints:
   POST   /api/v1/students/skills
   DELETE /api/v1/students/skills/:id
   GET    /api/v1/skills (public, shared router)

4. getMyTeams() returns { role, joinedAt, team: {...} }[] (nested). Always flatten:
   rawTeams.map(m => ({ ...(m.team ?? m), myRole: m.role ?? m.myRole, members: (m.team?.members ?? m.members) || [] }))

5. Server profile skills shape is { id, skillId, skillName, category, proficiencyLevel, yearsOfExperience } — there is NO nested skill: { name } object. Access name as s.skillName.

6. After profile save, always re-call getMyProfile() to re-sync local state from DB.

7. DashboardLayout must NOT redirect to /login — only middleware.ts does that. On mount, call GET /auth/me to hydrate Zustand.

8. Login page must verify /api/v1/auth/me before trusting isAuthenticated from Zustand. Clear store on 4xx.

9. Tailwind opacity must be multiples of 5 (bg-white/10, not bg-white/8). Add eslint-plugin-tailwindcss to lint.

10. select option dark theme must be applied via globals.css (browser ignores Tailwind classes on <option>):
    select option { background-color: #1A0A00; color: #fff; }

11. Docker: always run 'docker compose build --no-cache <service>' after source changes. Never rely on cached layers.

12. Express entry point is apps/core-gateway/src/index.ts — NOT src/main.ts (that is an empty NestJS scaffold).

13. Prisma 7 adapter pattern:
    import { PrismaPg } from '@prisma/adapter-pg'; import { Pool } from 'pg';
    const pool = new Pool({ connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL });
    const prisma = new PrismaClient({ adapter: new PrismaPg(pool) });

14. AI matching basicScoring fallback must return MatchResult shape:
    { suggestions: [{ candidateId, username, fullName, score (0-1), scoreBreakdown: { skill, experience, availability }, explanation, skills, complementarySkills }], totalCandidates: N }

github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Tests use Jest + Supertest for core-gateway, pytest for ai-engine. Auth tests must use cookies (not Authorization header). Set-Cookie header in responses; pass Cookie header in requests. Test credentials: alice.student@university.edu / password123.
